fields.name: logoText
fields.label: Logo Text
fields.instruction: Show this in the top-left corner of the site.

fields.name: showGithubButton
fields.label: Show GitHub Button
fields.instruction: Enable this to show a GitHub button in the navbar.

fields.name: githubButtonText
fields.label: GitHub Button Text
fields.instruction: Set the text shown on the GitHub button.

sections.label: Hero Section
sections.instruction: Use this first section to make a strong introduction.

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Your Full Name
fields.instruction: Display this as the main heading.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.instruction: Write 2-3 sentences about who you are and what you do.
fields.placeholder: I am a passionate developer with experience in building web applications for startups and clients...

fields.name: profileImage
fields.label: Your Profile Photo
fields.instruction: Show this as a circular image on the right side of the hero section.

fields.name: resumeLink
fields.label: Resume Link
fields.instruction: Add a resume link used by the resume button.

sections.label: Skills
sections.instruction: Group your skills into categories (for example, Frontend, Backend, Tools, Design).

fields.name: title
fields.label: Category Name
fields.instruction: Set a name for this skill group.

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Enter a skill and press Enter (or click Add) to include it.

sections.label: Work Experience
sections.instruction: Add your work history here; disable the section if you have no experience.

fields.name: showExperience
fields.label: Show Work Experience Section
fields.instruction: Disable this to hide the section when you have no work experience.

fields.name: sectionTitle
fields.label: Section Heading
fields.instruction: Set the title shown at the top of this section.

fields.name: sectionDesc
fields.label: Section Description
fields.instruction: Write a short line describing your experience.
fields.placeholder: Here is a summary of my professional journey so far...

fields.name: items
fields.label: Experience Entries
fields.instruction: Add each job or internship as a separate entry.

fields.name: role
fields.label: Your Job Title
fields.instruction: Set the position or role you held.

fields.name: companyLink
fields.label: Company Website
fields.instruction: Optionally add a company URL so visitors can open the company site.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Duration
fields.instruction: Set the time period for this role.

fields.name: desc
fields.label: What did you do?
fields.instruction: Describe your responsibilities and achievements.
fields.placeholder: Built and maintained web applications, worked with a team of 5 developers...

fields.name: skills
fields.label: Skills Used
fields.instruction: List the technologies or tools used in this role.

fields.name: companyLogo
fields.label: Company Logo
fields.instruction: Upload a company logo shown next to the role.

fields.name: showDoc
fields.label: Attach Experience Letter or Certificate
fields.instruction: Enable this to show an experience letter or internship certificate.

fields.name: doc
fields.label: Document Image
fields.instruction: Upload the experience letter or certificate image (shown only when enabled above).

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Showcase your best work here (minimum 1 project, maximum 8).

fields.name: description
fields.label: What does this project do?
fields.instruction: Explain what the project does and what problem it solves.
fields.placeholder: A full stack e-commerce platform where users can browse, add to cart and checkout products...

fields.name: image
fields.label: Project Thumbnail
fields.instruction: Upload an image shown on the project card (screenshot or banner).

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Technologies Used
fields.instruction: Enter a technology and press Enter to add it.

fields.name: github
fields.label: GitHub Repository Link
fields.instruction: Link this to the View Code button.

fields.name: webapp
fields.label: Live Demo Link
fields.instruction: Link this to the View Live App button.

fields.name: showMembers
fields.label: Was this a Team Project?
fields.instruction: Enable this if multiple people worked on this project.

fields.name: member
fields.label: Team Members
fields.instruction: Add team members (shown only when enabled above).

fields.name: img
fields.label: Member Photo
fields.instruction: Upload a small circular avatar for the project card.

sections.label: Education
sections.instruction: Add your educational background (university, college, or formal degree).

fields.name: sectionDesc
fields.label: Section Description
fields.instruction: Write a short line about your educational background.
fields.placeholder: Here is a summary of my educational journey...

fields.name: items
fields.label: Education Entries
fields.instruction: Add each degree or program as a separate entry.

fields.name: degree
fields.label: Degree or Program
fields.placeholder: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

fields.name: showGrade
fields.label: Show Grade or GPA
fields.instruction: Disable this if you do not want to show your grade.

fields.name: grade
fields.label: Grade or GPA
fields.instruction: Show this only when the toggle above is enabled.

fields.name: desc
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: Describe what you studied or achieved during this program.
fields.placeholder: Studied core subjects like data structures, algorithms, databases and software engineering...

fields.name: img
fields.label: Institute Logo
fields.instruction: Upload your university or school logo as a small thumbnail.

sections.label: Certifications
sections.instruction: Add completed online courses or certifications; disable the section if you have none.

fields.name: showCertifications
fields.label: Show Certifications Section
fields.instruction: Disable this to hide certifications when you have none.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Certifications
fields.instruction: Add each certification as a separate entry.

fields.name: issuer
fields.label: Issued By
fields.instruction: Set the platform or organization that issued this certification.

fields.name: credentialLink
fields.label: Verification Link
fields.instruction: Add a link where visitors can verify this certificate.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Certificate Image
fields.instruction: Upload a certificate image if you want to display it.

sections.label: Contact and Social Links
sections.instruction: Add contact details and social links so visitors can reach you.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Your Email Address
fields.instruction: Use this so visitors can email you directly.

fields.name: github
fields.label: GitHub Profile Link
fields.instruction: Add your public GitHub profile URL.

fields.name: showFacebook
fields.label: Show Facebook Link
fields.instruction: Enable this to display a Facebook icon in the footer.

fields.name: facebook
fields.label: Facebook Profile Link
fields.instruction: Show this only when the toggle above is enabled.

fields.name: showTwitter
fields.label: Show Twitter / X Link
fields.instruction: Enable this to display a Twitter icon in the footer.

fields.name: twitter
fields.label: Twitter / X Profile Link
fields.instruction: Show this only when the toggle above is enabled.

fields.name: showInstagram
fields.label: Show Instagram Link
fields.instruction: Enable this to display an Instagram icon in the footer.

fields.name: instagram
fields.label: Instagram Profile Link
fields.instruction: Show this only when the toggle above is enabled.

sections.label: Footer
sections.instruction: Customize the footer section of your portfolio.

fields.name: footerName
fields.label: Your Name in Footer
fields.instruction: Show this as the footer logo or brand name.
